imaging_history.finding: Status post right upper lobectomy. No local recurrence. New 0.8cm pleural-based opacity in left upper lobe — indeterminate; recommend short-interval follow-up.
Status post right upper lobectomy. No recurrent disease. No suspicious contralateral findings. Normal mediastinum.
2.1cm right upper lobe spiculated mass. No nodal involvement or distant metastasis. Consistent with primary NSCLC.
